name: Rosemary Roasted Fries
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Fresh rosemary or 1 teaspoon Dry rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a baking tray with foil and grease with olive oil spray.
2. Wash potatoes, do not peel; cut into strips about 3 inches long and 1/2 inch wide.
3. Place potatoes on the tray and spray with olive oil spray.
4. Place under broiler about 5 inches from heat for 5 minutes.
5. Chop garlic and rosemary together.
6. Remove potatoes from broiler and turn over with a spatula.
7. Sprinkle with the chopped garlic and rosemary.
8. Add salt and pepper to taste and replace under broiler for 5 minutes.
9. Remove and cover with foil to keep warm while you make the entree.
Nutritional information per serving: 217 calories; 5g protein, 50g carbohydrates, 0.4g fat (2%) Exchanges: .1 vegetable, 3 bread
